title: SQL: schema change makes server prone for kill (meltdown)
key_bug_features: schema change causes server vulnerability to kill
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_schema.test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TABLE test_schema.test_table2 (ref_id INT REFERENCES test_schema.test_table(id), description TEXT NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO test_schema.test_table2 (ref_id, description) VALUES (1, NULL);
